# healthcare corpus. Synthetic invalid placeholders only.

# === Provider identifiers ===
# NPI/DEA/NHS are checksum-gated (Block 6h); values are synthetic but
# Luhn/mod-11 valid.
# expect: US NPI (labeled)
NPI: 1234567893

# expect: US NPI Card Number
808401234567893

# expect: US DEA Number
BG1234563

# === Patient identifiers ===
# expect: UK NHS Number (labeled)
NHS: 943 476 5919

# expect: FHIR Patient Resource ID
GET /fhir/Patient/eXJZk-9bx2

# === Vendor tokens ===
# expect: Doximity API Token
dx_live_abcd1234efgh5678ijkl9012
